case_title: SCOTT D HOPPE VS. NORMA M ROLDAN

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED JUN-08-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROLDAN, NORMA M
DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOPPE, SCOTT D AS TO DEFENDANT ROLDAN, NORMA M
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY HOPPE, SCOTT D AS TO DEFENDANT ROLDAN, NORMA M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-29-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF SCOTT D. HOPPE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NORMA ROLDAN IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOVEMBER HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
